note: The image-rights manifest (DATA-10). Each record validates against schemas/image.schema.json and is the rights contract for one image the site references. The gate (scripts/check-images.mjs) treats the schema default, an unknown status, and any referenced-but-unmanifested image as not-cleared, so an image publishes only when a record here explicitly clears it. Phase 1 references no images; this seed record makes the manifest a non-zero corpus and proves the own-photographed happy path.
